items.name: observability-theme
items.title: Observability Theme
items.description: CSS variables and typography scale for observability components

theme.font-mono: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace

:where(html).--font-sans: Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif
:where(html).--font-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace
:where(html).--mono: ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace

items.name: observability-types
items.title: Observability Types
items.description: TypeScript types: TurnRecord, SessionMetrics, AgentSessionRow, PlivoListResponse

items.name: observability-format
items.title: Format Utilities
items.description: formatMs, formatDuration, formatDate, computeAvg, computePercentile

items.name: observability-events
items.title: Event Utilities
items.description: Event timestamp parsing, stable chronological sorting, and event time ranges

items.name: observability-api
items.title: API Client
items.description: createObservabilityApi(baseUrl) factory for fetching session data

items.name: observability-provider
items.title: Observability Provider
items.description: AgentObservabilityProvider context — wraps your app to provide API and session data

items.name: observability-hooks
items.title: Observability Hooks
items.description: useSessions, useSession, useTimeline, useTranscript, usePerformance

items.name: observability-chart-shared
items.title: Chart Shared Utilities
items.description: ChartCard, ChartTooltipShell, ChartLegendItem wrappers for recharts

items.name: metric-summary-cards
items.title: Metric Summary Cards
items.description: 6-stat card grid: turns, interruptions, tool calls, P95/avg latency, tokens

items.name: latency-percentiles-chart
items.title: Latency Percentiles Chart
items.description: Avg/P95 bar chart for STT, LLM, TTS, turn decision latency

items.name: pipeline-breakdown-chart
items.title: Pipeline Breakdown Chart
items.description: Stacked bar chart showing avg time in STT, LLM, TTS, and unaccounted

items.name: latency-over-turns-chart
items.title: Latency Over Turns Chart
items.description: Line chart showing how latency changes throughout the conversation

items.name: token-usage-section
items.title: Token Usage Section
items.description: Pie chart + stats: prompt/completion tokens, TTS characters, tokens/turn

items.name: conversation-dynamics
items.title: Conversation Dynamics
items.description: Voice-session rhythm strip (who spoke when, dead air, interruptions) plus talk ratio, TTFA percentiles, dead-air and pace stats

items.name: talk-time-chart
items.title: Talk Time Chart
items.description: Stacked bar chart comparing user vs agent speaking duration per turn

items.name: cache-efficiency-chart
items.title: Cache Efficiency Chart
items.description: Area chart showing prompt cache hit ratio over turns

items.name: llm-throughput-chart
items.title: LLM Throughput Chart
items.description: Line chart showing token generation speed (tok/s) per turn

items.name: session-header
items.title: Session Header
items.description: Session metadata display: ID, capabilities, duration, dates, recording link

items.name: turn-transcript
items.title: Turn Transcript
items.description: Conversation transcript with per-turn latency pills and tool calls

items.name: session-evaluations-drawer
items.title: Session Evaluations Drawer
items.description: Right-side sheet drawer for a session's evaluation results — verdict-tile summary plus an accordion of judges with reasoning, tone-coloured by pass/fail/maybe. Opened from the session detail header when evaluations are attached.

items.name: session-events
items.title: Session Events
items.description: Collapsible per-event timeline with light-tinted type badges and a relative/absolute time toggle

items.name: session-config
items.title: Session Config
items.description: Session options panel — pretty-printed JSON of AgentSession configuration captured for the call

items.name: session-timeline
items.title: Session Timeline
items.description: Audio waveform player + turn-by-turn trace visualization

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table (tablecn)
items.description: TanStack Table + shadcn primitives with nuqs URL-synced state. Ports sadmann7/shadcn-table + ObsDataTable wrapper.

items.name: sessions-page
items.title: Sessions Page
items.description: Paginated sessions list with tablecn-backed filters (account, transport, started-date). URL-synced via nuqs. Router-agnostic: navigation via onSessionClick callback.

items.name: session-detail-page
items.title: Session Detail Page
items.description: Full session detail with Session, Performance, Events, Config tabs, and post-session evaluations drawer. Requires shadcn primitives: badge, button, card, collapsible, scroll-area, separator, sheet, tabs. Uses react-router and lucide-react.

items.name: evals-page
items.title: Evals Page
items.description: Paginated eval runs list with tablecn-backed filters (agent, account, framework, started-date). URL-synced via nuqs. Router-agnostic: navigation via onRunClick callback.

items.name: eval-case-detail-page
items.title: Eval Case Detail
items.description: Single eval case detail — intended to render inside a Sheet drawer. Shows transcript, judgments, and failure block.

items.name: eval-run-detail-page
items.title: Eval Run Detail Page
items.description: Single eval run detail: pass-rate stats, CI metadata, tablecn cases table with status filter, and a case-detail drawer.

items.name: labels
items.title: Transport & Modality Labels
items.description: Single registry for TRANSPORT_LABELS, TRANSPORT_ICONS, MODALITY_LABELS, MODALITY_ICONS plus the matching transportLabel/transportIcon/modalityLabel helpers. Keeps the visual treatment of voice / audio_stream / sip / text / terminal consistent across every list page.

items.name: kpi
items.title: KPI Tile + Sparkline
items.description: Reusable KPI tile (label / value / sub / hint / value-tone / sparkline / fill bar) with the small uppercase tracked label typography used across agent overview, sessions list, simulation evals, conversation evals, and the eval-run detail KPI strip.

items.name: obs-cells
items.title: Shared Table Cell Renderers
items.description: CapsChips, ModalityChip, TransportPill, TransportBadge, DurationCell — table cells shared across agents, sessions, evals, and conversation evals lists. Class-driven; styles live in observability.css.

items.name: agents-page
items.title: Agents Page
items.description: Top-level agents list — every named LiveKit worker observed via sessions or eval runs, with modality, p95 duration, sim pass rate, and account. Router-agnostic via onAgentClick.

items.name: analytics-page
items.title: Analytics Page
items.description: Fleet-wide analytics — session volume, cost, p95 perceived latency, interruption rate, judge pass rate and outcome success across all agents, with agent/account breakdowns and 24h/7d/30d ranges. Router-agnostic via onAgentClick.

items.name: agent-scope-header
items.title: Agent Scope Header
items.description: Persistent breadcrumb + agent identity card. Drops into every agent-scoped detail screen so the 'which agent am I looking at' context never disappears. Reads agent data via useAgent; accepts an optional trail of extra breadcrumb segments and a rightSlot (e.g. a range picker on the agent landing).

items.name: agent-overview-tab
items.title: Agent Overview Tab
items.description: Agent dashboard's Overview tab — 4 KPI tiles (Sessions / p95 latency / LiveKit judge pass rate / Simulation pass rate) with sparklines or pass-rate bars, plus Sessions over time / p95 latency over time / Avg session duration / LLM provider mix charts.

items.name: agent-runs-page
items.title: Agent Runs Page (Simulation Evals)
items.description: Per-agent eval-runs view with KPI tiles (Pass rate avg, p95 TTFT, Total cost, Total runs) + sparklines + searchable runs table. Supports embedded mode for use inside an agent-detail tab.

items.name: conversation-eval-detail-drawer
items.title: Conversation Eval Detail Drawer
items.description: Side drawer rendering one conversation eval row — outcome, verdict counts (icon+number), and the per-judge accordion from session-evaluations-drawer.

items.name: conversation-evals-tab
items.title: Conversation Evals Tab
items.description: Paginated session-level eval list — outcome chip, verdict counts, judge chips with overflow, KPI tiles (Total / Pass rate / Outcome trend / Top failing judge), session-id substring + failed-only filters.

items.name: agent-detail-page
items.title: Agent Detail Page
items.description: Agent dashboard with Overview / Sessions / Simulation Evals / Conversation Evals tabs. URL-synced range picker (24h / 7d / 30d) propagates to the Overview KPIs and Sessions tab sparklines.

items.name: eval-run-compare-page
items.title: Eval Run Compare Page
items.description: Side-by-side comparison of two eval runs for a single agent. Renders pass-rate, latency, token / cost deltas plus diverged-case breakdown.
